name: Pasta Salad (Good for Picnics)
recipeIngredient: 1 Red Bell Pepper sliced into strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the tortellini according to package directions.
2. Drain and rinse the artichoke hearts, then cut them into quarters.
3. Add the remaining salad makings (except parmesan) to a large bowl.
4. Mix with the dressing: In a small bowl, combine garlic, salt, pepper, mustard, balsamic vinegar, olive oil, and basil until smooth.
5. Toss the salad ingredients with the dressing in another bowl.
6. Sprinkle generously with grated Parmesan cheese.
7. Refrigerate until ready to serve. Consider using less salt in the dressing due to the additional cheese and tortellini.
